title: White Hollybush Advent Pillar Candle 3 – Christmas Countdown Candle, 70hr Burn, Festive Candle for Table, Mantelpiece & Seasonal Décor
features: Beautifully illustrated Advent candle featuring classic festive designs that bring the magic of Christmas into any home.
Smooth, unscented 70-hour burn designed for daily lighting from December 1st–24th for a warm, glowing countdown.
Timeless holiday décor piece that adds charm, warmth, and tradition to mantels, tables, or seasonal displays.
Easy and enchanting daily ritual—simply burn to the next number each evening for a delightful way to mark the days.
A cherished Christmas keepsake that blends festive beauty with a heartfelt countdown tradition.
description: Product description Bring the magic of Christmas into your home with the Advent Pillar Candle. Beautifully illustrated with festive artwork, this traditional candle looks perfectly at home on any mantel. Its cheerful, classic design captures the joyful spirit of the season, making it a timeless piece of Christmas décor. This unscented Advent candle burns smoothly and evenly for up to 70 hours—just right for lighting each evening from December 1st to 24th. Simply burn the candle down to the next number each night and enjoy a warm, glowing countdown to Christmas. A festive addition to your home, this charming candle offers a delightful way to mark each day of the holiday season. Light it daily and watch the excitement build as Christmas draws near. More than just a decoration, it helps create cherished family traditions, sparking joy and anticipation with every flickering flame. Celebrate the season with a meaningful countdown, a beautifully detailed design. Safety Warning Keep the candle on a stable, heat-resistant surface. Trim the wick to 5–7 mm before each use to promote an even burn. Avoid placing the candle in drafts, direct sunlight, or cold areas, as this may affect burn performance. Never leave a burning candle unattended. Keep away from children, pets, and flammable materials. Allow the wax to fully cool and harden before moving or relighting. Store in a cool, dry place to maintain the candle’s shape and colour.
